project.description: Name of the existing Nx project to wire up for TypeORM.

domain.description: Domain name used when scaffolding a library project.

schema.description: Database schema to use. Defaults to the provided domain.

db.description: Database type used for generated datasource connection templates.

withCompose.description: Include a Docker Compose file for local Postgres development.

skipInstall.description: Skip running package installations after updating dependencies.

schemaPath.description: Relative path from the project root where schema.ts should be generated for library projects.

migrationsDir.description: Relative directory from the project root where the initial migration should be generated for library projects.
